explore.checkConnectionRetry: Check your connection and try again.
explore.couldntLoadPlacesFull: Couldn't load places. Check your connection and try again.
explore.filterDescription: Use filters to find places by tags, visited status, or search by name.

addPlace.title: Add Place
addPlace.chooseMapWhenSaving: You'll choose a map when saving
addPlace.viewerCannotEdit: You're a viewer of this map. Switch to a map you can edit to add places.
addPlace.searchHint: Search for a restaurant, cafe, bar, or any place to add to your map.
addPlace.noResults: No results found. Try a different search.

profile.couldntLoadProfile: Couldn't load your profile. Check your connection and try again.
profile.mapLimitMessage: Free accounts are limited to 1 map. Upgrade to premium for unlimited maps.
profile.newMapPromptMessage: Enter a name for your new map
profile.upgradeCTASubtitle: Unlimited maps, places, and sharing with friends.

mapSettings.title: Map Settings
mapSettings.cannotDeleteMessage: You must have at least one map. Create another map before deleting this one.
mapSettings.deleteMapMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{mapName}}"? This will permanently remove all places, tags, and members. This cannot be undone.
mapSettings.leaveMapMessage: Are you sure you want to leave "{{mapName}}"? You will lose access to this map.

paywall.title: Premium
paywall.alreadyPremiumSubtitle: You have unlimited access to all MapVault features.
paywall.unlockSubtitle: Save more places, create unlimited maps, and share with friends.
paywall.legalPrefix: By subscribing, you agree to our
paywall.restoredMessage: Your premium access has been restored.
paywall.noPurchasesMessage: We could not find any previous purchases to restore.
paywall.restoreErrorMessage: Failed to restore purchases. Please try again.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.heading: Delete Your Account
deleteAccount.subtitle: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.consequence1: Your profile and personal data will be permanently deleted
deleteAccount.consequence2: Maps where you are the sole member will be deleted
deleteAccount.consequence3: For shared maps, ownership will transfer to another member
deleteAccount.consequence4: Your visits and saved places will be removed
deleteAccount.consequence5: Places you added to shared maps will remain but your name will be removed
deleteAccount.activeSubscriptionMessage: You have an active subscription. Deleting your account won't automatically cancel it. Please cancel in Settings > Apple ID > Subscriptions first.
deleteAccount.confirmMessage: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.deletionFailedFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.

invite.contributorDescription: You can add, edit, and remove places.
invite.memberDescription: You can view places but not edit them.
invite.errorNotFound: This invite link is invalid or has been removed.
invite.errorExpired: This invite has expired. Ask the map owner for a new link.
invite.errorMaxUses: This invite has reached its maximum number of uses.
invite.errorAlreadyMember: You're already a member of this map.

emptyState.title: Save your first place
emptyState.subtitle: Start building your personal map by adding places you love or want to visit.

errorState.title: Something went wrong
errorState.defaultMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

filterSheet.tagsAllMapsHint: Switch to a specific map to filter by tags

inviteSection.title: Invites

inviteSection.noInvitesYet: No invites yet. Create one to share this map.

mapPickerSheet.title: Save to Map
